name: ASUS PRO B760M-CT-CSM Micro-ATX Business Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR5-6200(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - Intel Gigabit LAN - M.2 slot (Key E)
shortName: ASUS PRO B760M-CT-CSM Micro-ATX Business Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Micro-ATX business motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR5 support and dual video outputs.
